modifications: Reduced the provider profile to Polaris capabilities and API modes
Added immutable normalized message, tool-call, usage, and completion contracts
Added strict registry collision handling and secret-safe configuration repr
Converted declarative plugin metadata into a concrete async provider
Added static API-key and per-request Entra authentication
Shared the normalized Chat Completions and Responses transport
Removed Hermes lazy dependency installation and dashboard helpers
Retained lazy azure-identity import and cached DefaultAzureCredential
Exposed both Foundry and classic Cognitive Services token scopes
Added typed async handlers and journal-compatible safety classes
Retained thread-safe registration and last-good availability caching
Added explicit reconciliation handlers and result-size contracts
